catalog_content:
Item Name: RiceSelect Whole Wheat Orzo Rice-Shaped Pasta, Non-GMO, Vegan, 26.5-Ounce Jars, 4-Count
Bullet Point 1: ENRICH YOUR KITCHEN with RiceSelect Whole Wheat Orzo, our premium small pasta. Much like your favorite pastas, our rice-shaped pasta adds chewy, satisfying texture and hearty goodness to elevate any recipe.
Bullet Point 2: HEALTHY AND TRADITIONAL: Our Orzo pasta is Non-GMO Project Verified and Certified Kosher by Star K, making it a great addition to your pantry, no matter your dietary restrictions. Perfect for home cooks, vegans, and vegetarians alike!
Bullet Point 3: LITTLE PASTA. ENORMOUS CULINARY POTENTIAL: Like couscous, rice, and quinoa, orzo is an ideal match for all kinds of dishes. The culinary potential for orzo pasta is endless! Orzo is made with 100% enriched whole wheat durum semolina wheat, making it the perfect pantry staple for delicious and filling meals. Perfect for jazzing up soups, stews, salads, casseroles, veggies, meat, chicken, fish, etc.
Bullet Point 4: PASTA MADE WITH HIGH QUALITY WHEAT: RiceSelect Orzo is made with high-quality durum wheat that contains 8 grams of protein and 4 grams of dietary fiber per serving. No preservatives or additives and low in fat, cholesterol, and sodium.
Bullet Point 5: HOW TO COOK: See Back of Jar for Full Details (Bring water to a boil. Add salt, if desired. Stir in Orzo. Return to a boil. Cook uncovered for 8-10 minutes. Drain and serve.)
Bullet Point 6: Packaged in four 100% recyclable, BPA-Free 26.5-ounce jars
Value: 106.0
Unit: Ounce
product_name: RiceSelect Whole Wheat Orzo Rice-Shaped Pasta
overall_summary: Positioned as a premium pantry staple with a health-focused angle, this whole wheat orzo pasta leverages its non-GMO and vegan certifications alongside Kosher approval to justify a higher price point. The multi-pack format (4 x 26.5 oz jars) enhances perceived value for bulk buyers, while the recyclable, BPA-free plastic packaging aligns with eco-conscious consumer preferences. The absence of preservatives and high protein/fiber content (8g protein, 4g fiber per serving) supports its positioning as a nutrient-dense alternative to traditional pasta, catering to health-oriented shoppers.

The Ultimate Snack Symphony

Indulge in a symphony of flavors with our exclusive trio: Sweet and Salty Kettle Popcorn, Party Mix, and Potato Stix. Our Sweet and Salty Popcorn is the star of any gathering, expertly balancing sugary whispers with savory notes in each kettle-cooked kernel.
